'''yazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:palaeobotanically|palaeobotanically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:palaeobotanically|palaeobotanically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yazhate|yazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yazhatesher|yazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhatesherĂ«m|yazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazhatero|yazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yazhateshĂ«|yazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhateshĂ«m|yazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazhatero|gokiyazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyazhateshĂ«|gokiyazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhateshĂ«m|gokiyazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyazhankerom|goyazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyazhankeshĂ«|goyazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazhankeshĂ«m|goyazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyazhankeya|goyazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazhaterom|yazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhatemu|yazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yazhateya|yazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazhaterom|gokiyazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhatemu|gokiyazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyazhateya|gokiyazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yazhazhate|yazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yazhazhatesher|yazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhazhatesherĂ«m|yazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazhazhatero|yazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yazhazhateshĂ«|yazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhazhateshĂ«m|yazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazhazhatero|gokiyazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyazhazhateshĂ«|gokiyazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhazhateshĂ«m|gokiyazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyazhazhankerom|goyazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyazhazhankeshĂ«|goyazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazhazhankeshĂ«m|goyazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyazhazhankeya|goyazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazhazhaterom|yazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhazhatemu|yazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yazhazhateya|yazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazhazhaterom|gokiyazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhazhatemu|gokiyazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyazhazhateya|gokiyazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠte|yĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠtesher|yĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠtero|yĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠterom|yĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠtemu|yĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠzhĂŠteya|yĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafzhafte|yafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafzhaftesher|yafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafzhaftesherĂ«m|yafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafzhaftero|yafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafzhafteshĂ«|yafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafzhafteshĂ«m|yafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafzhaftero|gokiyafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafzhafteshĂ«|gokiyafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafzhafteshĂ«m|gokiyafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafzhafnkerom|goyafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafzhafnkeshĂ«|goyafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafzhafnkeshĂ«m|goyafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafzhafnkeya|goyafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafzhafterom|yafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafzhaftemu|yafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafzhafteya|yafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafzhafterom|gokiyafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafzhaftemu|gokiyafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafzhafteya|gokiyafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
